issues.description: TrashFromHand is a cost/payment action, not the main effect. The card text shows 'You may trash 1 card from your hand:' as a conditional cost, followed by the actual effect 'If you have 1 or less Life cards, add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards.' The condition 'you have 1 or less Life cards' is missing from the DSL.

FlipLife is used incorrectly. The effect should use SearchDeck to search top of deck, then add to Life cards (which is a form of SearchDeck with specific destination). FlipLife is for converting deck cards to Life cards via a different mechanic. The correct structure should check life count condition first, then SearchDeck.
Missing the life count condition. The effect only triggers if 'you have 1 or less Life cards' – this should be a nested condition inside thenActions after the TrashFromHand cost.
